title: Change Updates Preference And Recover From Missing Email
goal: Reach check answers on the no-email branch, change the updates answer to Yes, recover from the missing-email validation error, and stop after the summary shows the new email row.
instruction: Complete the travel support prototype to check answers on the no-email branch. Change the updates answer to Yes, recover from the missing-email validation error, and verify the summary now includes the email address.
review_notes: Hard summary-edit task on the travel-support prototype. It changes a no-email route to the email branch and recovers from the new required-field validation before returning to check answers.

steps.explanation: I entered the applicant name to start the service journey.
The name is complete, so I am moving to the updates question.
I selected no email updates for the initial route.
The initial answers are complete, so I am moving to check answers.
I followed the change link for email updates so I can switch this route to the email branch.
I changed the updates answer to Yes, which makes an email address required.
The page should now report that an email address is required for this branch.
I entered the required email address so the updated route can continue.
The required email is present now, so I am returning to check answers to verify the new summary row.

action.summary: I changed the updates preference to Yes, recovered from the missing-email validation error, and returned to check answers with the new email row visible.

steps.explanation: The updated review page now includes the email row, so I am ending the task.
